name: Ayush Munot

intro.headline: ML Engineer specializing in representation learning, search, and evaluations. Core contributor to MTEB.
paragraphs: I am an ML Engineer focused on representation learning, search, and evaluation. I am a final-year student at IIT Kharagpur, pursuing a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and an M.Tech in Financial Engineering, with a Computer Science minor and an AI micro-specialization.

Most recently, I have built retrieval pipelines for Cody at Sourcegraph, worked on financial AI solutions at Fidelity Investments, and conducted vision-language research with the AFAR Lab at the University of Cambridge and IISc Bangalore. I help maintain MTEB (Massive Text Embedding Benchmark) as a core contributor, and co-authored MAEB (Multilingual Audio Embedding Benchmark).

footerNote: Personal site — content sourced from CV and project repos.
